title: tithymalus sanasunitensis
intro: Tithymalus sanasunitensis, also known as Euphorbia sanasunitensis, is a succulent plant species found in Morocco and North Africa. It is known for its medicinal properties, particularly in traditional medicine, where it is used to treat various health issues due to its anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties. The plant is believed to have health benefits such as reducing fever, alleviating pain, and treating skin conditions like acne and eczema. Herbal preparations of Tithymalus sanasunitensis include infusions, decoctions, and poultices, which can be used topically or taken internally to harness its medicinal properties.
